last_run: Run 56 (2026-04-21): Task 8 Route B catch-up — 5 new correspondence targets (limit_size, config_validate, Inflights, LogUnstable, TallyVotes), 56 new #guard, 5 Rust test fns. Task 9: lean-ci.yml correspondence-tests job added, triggers expanded to src/**. PR: lean-squad/run-56-task8-task9-catchup-24703152990.
hqc_preserved_gap: CLOSED via AEBroadcastInvariant.lean (ABI8=hqc_preserved_of_broadcast). Remaining: connect broadcast model to full Raft election lifecycle (election → AE broadcast → ABI8).
toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, use 'theorem' not 'lemma', stdlib only. lakefile.toml has globs=[FVSquad.+*]. LogUnstable.lean has NO namespace — open FVSquad.LogUnstable fails. Import it and use names directly. List.getElem?_append_left takes h:i<l1.length. List.getElem?_take is a simp lemma (simp [h] closes goal). IsUpToDate.lean has NO namespace — use LogId, isUpToDate directly (no 'open FVSquad.IsUpToDate').
notes: Run 52: Task 8 Route B: MaybeAppendCorrespondence.lean (32 #guard, 8 cases), makeLog_none proved in FindConflictCorrespondence. 35 lean files, sorry 2→1.

Run 53: Task 8 Route B: IsUpToDateCorrespondence.lean (12 #guard, exact correspondence), CommittedIndexCorrespondence.lean (8 #guard, abstraction level). 37 lean files, sorry stays 1. 4 correspondence test targets total.

Run 54: Task 8 Route B: VoteResultCorrespondence.lean (12 #guard, exact). 38 lean files, 40 lake build jobs. Task 9: lean-ci.yml updated — new 'correspondence-tests' job runs 'cargo test correspondence' on every PR touching lean/tests/src.

Run 55: Task 8 Route B: VoteResultCorrespondence.lean (12 #guard, exact correspondence), HasQuorumCorrespondence.lean (12 #guard, exact correspondence). 39 lean files, sorry stays 1. 6 correspondence test targets total, 93 #guard assertions.
